conversation.content: Let's have a chemistry class. Today we will learn the rule for the synthesis of water molecules in the world of Azeroth.
My notebook is ready. Let's begin.

In this world, water molecules cannot be synthesized in the conventional way and must meet specific conditions: only one hydrogen molecule, one oxygen atom, and one carbon atom interacting with each other can combine to form one water molecule.
This rule is the foundation for our future study of more complex chemical reactions in the world of Azeroth.
